title: Adaptability Enchantment
description: Adds an enchantment called Adaptability for tridents that allows it to change between Loyalty and Riptide
body:
Ever wish you could have Loyalty and Riptide on the same trident? Well now you can!
This pack adds an enchantment for the Trident called Adaptability. Adaptability makes a trident enchanted with it switch between Loyalty and Riptide depending on whether or not the player holding it is in the water. Moving the Trident to the offhand will lock the enchantment until it is held in the mainhand again. The enchantment can be found very rarely in the enchantment table at level 30 or in villager trades.
A trident with any other enchantment cannot be enchanted with Adaptability, but once you hold the trident, it will be enchanted with either Loyalty III or Riptide III, Mending, and Unbreaking III.
